title: Emissions, Temperature and Economic Growth: An Empirical Analysis of Europe

summary.about: The relationship among greenhouse-gas emissions, temperature change and economic growth across Europe.
summary.audience: European climate policymakers, economists and environmental researchers.
summary.method: Applies time-series clustering to 33 countries from 1990–2016 and tests the environmental Kuznets-curve pattern.
summary.insights: Country clusters show distinct emissions-growth-temperature relationships, supporting more tailored environmental policy.
